title: Shadow Puppet Theater: Choreographed Flight & Dance
description: The user directs a shadow puppet theater where a rigged humanoid figure performs dance moves on a shadow-casting stage while a stork circles overhead. The user choreographs a synchronized animation sequence by adjusting flight radius, dance speed, spotlight angle, shadow intensity, animation blending, and playback timing across multiple coordinated steps.
prompt:
Create a single HTML file using Three.js r170 that implements an interactive shadow puppet theater scene. Load three GLB assets: ShadowmappableMesh.glb as the ground stage platform, stork.glb as a flying bird, and RiggedFigure.glb as a humanoid dancer. Use GLTFLoader from CDN. Set up a PerspectiveCamera at position (0, 5, 12) looking at the origin. Add a DirectionalLight with shadow mapping enabled (shadow.mapSize 2048x2048, shadow.camera covering -10 to 10 on all axes). The ShadowmappableMesh should receive shadows and be placed at y=0 as the stage floor. The RiggedFigure stands on the stage, casting shadows, with its AnimationMixer playing its default animation. The stork flies in a circular path above the stage at y=4, also casting shadows onto the stage below. Create a dat.GUI panel with these controls requiring validation: (1) 'flightRadius' slider 2-8, default 4, controlling the stork's orbit radius. (2) 'flightSpeed' slider 0.1-3.0, default 1.0, controlling stork orbit angular velocity. (3) 'danceSpeed' slider 0.25-4.0, default 1.0, controlling the RiggedFigure animation timeScale. (4) 'spotlightAngle' slider 0-90 degrees, default 45, rotating the DirectionalLight around the X-axis to shift shadow projections across the stage. (5) 'shadowDarkness' slider 0.0-1.0, default 0.5, controlling shadow opacity via the light intensity. (6) 'syncMode' checkbox that when enabled locks the stork's orbit phase to the dance animation's normalized time, creating synchronized choreography. (7) 'storkHeight' slider 2-8, default 4, adjusting the stork's Y position. (8) A 'Play Sequence' button that triggers a 5-second automated choreography: ramps danceSpeed from 0.5 to 3.0, sweeps spotlightAngle from 20 to 70, and pulses flightRadius between 3 and 6. Validate all parameters stay within bounds during the automated sequence. Use renderer with shadowMap enabled (PCFSoftShadowMap). Add ambient light at 0.3 intensity. Animate everything in a requestAnimationFrame loop updating both AnimationMixers and orbital positions.

[State Exposure (required)]
Expose window.__3D_STATE__ updated every animation frame:
window.__3D_STATE__ = {
  flightRadius: number,         // current orbital radius of the stork around the stage center in units
  flightSpeed: number,         // angular velocity multiplier for the stork's circular flight path
  danceSpeed: number,         // timeScale multiplier for the RiggedFigure animation mixer
  spotlightAngle: number,         // rotation angle in degrees of the DirectionalLight around the stage
  shadowIntensity: number,         // intensity value of shadows cast on the stage platform
  storkHeight: number,         // y-coordinate height of the stork above the stage floor
  figureAnimationTime: number,         // current playback time of the RiggedFigure animation in seconds
  storkAngle: number,         // current angular position of the stork in its circular orbit in radians
  lightPositionX: number,         // x-coordinate of the DirectionalLight position
  lightPositionZ: number,         // z-coordinate of the DirectionalLight position
  assetsLoaded: boolean,         // whether all three GLB assets have successfully loaded
  animationActive: boolean,         // whether the animation mixer is actively playing
}
